programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: A honky-tonk whiskey bar serves amazing tacos; haute hot dogs and sausages with global flavors; students flock to a delicious Cambodian sandwich shop; a quirky Venezuelan restaurant offers seventeen different arepas.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: A Mexican brunch in Boulder, Colo.; how one chef in New York is really breaking the mold; small delicacies in Washington D.C.; a grocery store-turned Mexican food hot spot.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: A visit to great getaways where the food is just as worthy of the trip as the lodging itself.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: A breakfast of baked eggs and tomato stew; favorite comfort foods turned into dumplings; duck crepes and black garlic bread pudding; Asian street food turned on its head.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: The exciting things chefs are doing to make vegetables decadent and delicious.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: A San Francisco legend turns Chinese food on its head; a New York City favorite where American classics get a twist.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls across America with a list of deliciously doughy midway munchies that he kneads to try; from the OMG Pretzel Bomb to the Pumpkin Pie Beignet, these treats are perfect for all the gluten gluttons and yeasty boys and girls.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels coast to coast sampling the best carnival creations inspired by the cuisine of Latin America; this fiesta of food features both classic and crazy carnival treats, from Tex-Mex to traditional.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe experiences the Texas State Fair to the fullest; Noah gets stuffed and so does a boneless chicken wing filled with Asian-inspired goodies and favors.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.sub-title: Indiana State Fair; Old Canal Days

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Thanksgiving Waffle in Toronto at the Canadian National Exhibition; Korean Kimchi Dog at Prairiefest in Illinois.
